evals.prompt: Create a custom color palette for my brand with primary, secondary, and neutral colors in Tailwind CSS 4
evals.expected_output: Agent provides a @theme block with --color-primary-*, --color-secondary-*, and --color-neutral-* tokens, shows usage in utility classes
expectations: Defines colors as --color-* CSS custom properties
Shows how to use the colors as utility classes (bg-primary-500, text-secondary-700)
Colors are accessible via var(--color-primary-500) in custom CSS

evals.prompt: How do I add custom fonts and spacing to my Tailwind theme?
evals.expected_output: Agent shows @theme block with --font-* and --spacing-* tokens
expectations: Uses @theme block for both fonts and spacing

evals.prompt: I have colors defined in tailwind.config.js extend.colors. How do I move them to TW4?
evals.expected_output: Agent provides before/after showing JavaScript config colors converted to @theme --color-* tokens
expectations: Shows the old extend.colors format as 'before'
Explains that @theme compiles to CSS custom properties
Mentions that theme() function should be replaced with var()
